arts.ttl: Hansi Flick gives verdict on La Liga title race ahead of Barça vs Rayo
arts.sum: Hansi Flick was asked in a press conference on Sunday if he was aware of the slip-ups by the Madrid teams and what statement his side needs to make against a dangerous Rayo side, and the German coach made it clear Barça need to show a title-winning mentality on Monday. “I want to be judged by how we play and by the titles we win.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea preparing €100 million offer for Barcelona star in bid to bolster defence
arts.sum: Chelsea are gearing up for a massive summer move for Barcelona’s defensive stalwart Jules Kounde, according to reports from Spain. The Blues are long-time admirers of the French defender, having tried to sign him before he joined the Catalan side.
